market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
articles.description: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

articles.title: Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves
articles.description: Following State Street, Fidelity is targeting reserve assets that underpin the expanding stablecoin market.

articles.title: Bitcoin capitulation ‘twice as weak’ after spot liquidity turns supportive: Glassnode
articles.description: Bitcoin’s realized losses fell by 46% as increasing bid-side liquidity points to easing sell pressure. Can bulls push BTC price back above $70,000?

articles.title: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive
articles.description: Snap's long awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.

articles.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
articles.description: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies cut Claude licenses

articles.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
articles.description: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

articles.title: FTC lawsuit reveals how subscription scam networks evade app store enforcement
articles.description: A new FTC lawsuit reveals how sophisticated subscription app operators can allegedly use shell companies and payment infrastructure to stay active on app stores despite mounting consumer complaints.

articles.title: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
articles.description: The rollout in collaboration with Ondo Finance broadens access to tokenized traditional assets as demand for onchain stocks and ETFs continues to grow.

articles.title: Here is how Coinbase plan to survive the crypto downturn by ditching its reliance on trading fees
articles.description: Analysts say the exchange's push into derivatives, payments and infrastructure broadens its growth story beyond crypto trading.

articles.title: Altcoin selling tops $266B as capital rotates out of crypto: Is altseason extinct?
articles.description: Altcoin spot demand fell to its weakest level in six years while the stablecoin market cap, stocks and AI industry continued to capture investors’ attention.

articles.title: Bitcoin layer-2s face a bear-market reality check
articles.description: Botanix's shutdown has raised an uncomfortable question for Bitcoin builders: Does the market actually want programmable BTC, or just a better way to borrow, lend and earn yield on it?

articles.title: FIFA wanted Avalanche's blockchain to help curb World Cup ticket scalping. Here's how it's going
articles.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're looking at how FIFA is using the Avalanche blockchain to test out a new ticketing system.

articles.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
articles.description: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight  — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.

articles.title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
articles.description: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

articles.title: Fed holds rates steady in first decision under new Chairman Kevin Warsh
articles.description: The accompanying policy statement and updated economic projections, however, took a hawkish turn.

articles.title: Kalshi adds software partner as it looks to boost prediction market surveillance
articles.description: The collaboration comes as US state regulators and the CFTC battle over oversight of event-based contracts.

articles.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
articles.description: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

articles.title: Mastodon looks to newsletters to help revive the open social web
articles.description: Mastodon’s newly launched newsletter feature lets anyone subscribe to creators by email, even without a Mastodon account.

articles.title: US lawmakers warn against presidential pardon for Sam Bankman-Fried
articles.description: The former FTX CEO is currently serving a 25-year sentence after being found guilty on seven felony charges related to the misuse of customer funds.

articles.title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
articles.description: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.
